item.title: 工作流程提示 #19：重命名变量、卡片描述、卡片文档和在线聚会重播 | Workflows Tips #19: Renaming Variables, Card Description, Card Documentation, and Online Meetup Replay
item.description:
欢迎来到另一个 Okta 工作流提示帖子。 阅读所有其他提示⤵️

在这篇文章中：

  • 重命名卡片变量以获取更多信息
  • 添加卡片描述以获取更多信息
  • 快速访问卡的文档
  • 在线聚会重播：在 25 分钟内构建工作流程自动化

重命名卡片变量以获取更多信息

当您构建流程并将数据从一张卡连接到另一张卡时，输出变量名称将是默认值。 下面的流程创建两个列表，然后创建一个仅包含两个列表中包含的项目的新列表。

输出变量都命名为list ，并且名称被传递到列表 - 交叉卡输入。

您可以重命名变量并为其赋予新名称。 这将使您和以后查看流程的任何人更容易阅读流程。

单击卡片的齿轮图标，然后选择Edit card 。 然后单击铅笔图标以重命名变量（请注意，您可以在不单击铅笔图标的情况下编辑输出变量）。 单击保存按钮以保存新的变量名称。

这是重命名后流程的样子：

重命名变量可以很容易地理解和阅读流程。

添加卡片描述以获取更多信息

注释卡允许将注释和注释添加到流中以使其更易于理解。 另一种选择是向卡片本身添加评论或注释。 单击齿轮图标并选择编辑卡。 在卡片顶部，点击卡片名称旁边的铅笔图标。 在描述区域中，您可以输入此卡在流程中的作用。

要查看流的描述，请将鼠标悬停在卡名称上：

这是添加有关卡或流程如何工作的信息的另一个选项。 使用Notes卡的好处是它不会使流程变长，并且不会一直可见。

注意：不建议更改卡名。 重命名卡片会使您在稍后查看流程时很难看到实际使用的卡片。

快速访问卡的文档

在构建流程时，通过单击？快速访问任何工作流程卡的文档？ 卡片左下角的图标：

帮助弹出窗口将向您显示卡的方式、输入/输出以及任何其他信息。 可以移动弹出窗口。 您也可以在Flow History选项卡中打开它。

在线聚会重播：在 25 分钟内构建工作流程自动化

我们举办了另一场在线聚会，在 25 分钟内构建工作流程自动化。 观看重播，逐步了解如何在 25 分钟内构建真正的工作流程。

两个资源可帮助您了解更多信息：

📌 Try this step-by-step getting started tutorial: Build Your First Automation With Okta Workflows: Notify When User Is Suspended . 📌 试试这个分步入门教程： 使用 Okta 工作流构建您的第一个自动化：当用户被暂停时通知。

📌 All the Workflows resources (docs, tutorial, office hours, templates, office hours and more) 📌 所有Workflows 资源（文档、教程、办公时间、模板、办公时间等）



原文:

Welcome to another Okta Workflows Tips post. Read all other tips ⤵️

In this post:

  • Rename card variables for more information
  • Add card description for more information
  • Quickly access a card’s documentation
  • Online meetup replay: Build a Workflow Automation in 25 Minutes

Rename card variables for more information

As you build a flow and connect data from one card to another, the output variable names will be default. The flow below creates two lists and then creates a new list that contains only those items that are included in both lists.

The output variables are both named list and the names are carried over to List – Intersection card inputs.

You can rename variables and give them new names. This will make it easier to read the flow for you and anyone looking at the flow later.

Click the card’s gear icon and choose Edit card. Then click the pencil icon to rename variables (note that output variables you can edit without clicking the pencil icon). Click Save button to save the new variable names.

This is how the flow looks after renaming:

Renaming variables makes it easy to understand and read a flow.

Add card description for more information

The Notes cards allows to add comments and notes to a flow to make it easier to understand. Another option is to add comments or notes to a card itself. Click the gear icon and select Edit card. At the top of the card, click the pencil icon next to the card name. In the Description area you can enter what this card does in a flow.

To view the description on a flow, hover the mouse over the card name:

This is another option adding information about how the card or the flow works. The benefit over using a Notes card is that it won’t make a flow longer and it’s not visible all the time.

Note : changing the card name is not recommending. Renaming a card will make it difficult to see what actual card is used when you look at a flow at a later time.

Quickly access a card’s documentation

When building a flow quickly access any Workflows card’s documentation by clicking the ? icon in the lower left corner of a card:

The help popup will show you how the card, its input/outputs, and any other information. The popup can be moved. You can also open it in Flow History tab.

Online Meetup Replay: Build a Workflow Automation in 25 Minutes

We hosted another online meetup Build a Workflow Automation in 25 Minutes. Watch the replay to learn step-by-step how to build a real workflow in 25 minutes.

Two resources to help you learn more:

📌 Try this step-by-step getting started tutorial: Build Your First Automation With Okta Workflows: Notify When User Is Suspended.

📌 All the Workflows resources (docs, tutorial, office hours, templates, office hours and more)
item.author: maxkatz

item.title: 工作流提示 #18：访问所有用户属性、If/Else 条件的输出和部分用户更新 | Workflows Tips #18: Access All User Properties, Output for If/Else Condition, and Partial User Update
item.description:
欢迎来到另一个 Okta 工作流提示帖子。 阅读所有其他提示⤵️


在这篇文章中：
  • 使用读取用户卡访问所有用户属性
  • 如何为 if/else 条件创建输出
  • 如何进行部分用户更新

如何使用读取用户卡访问所有用户属性

当 Okta 连接事件触发时，它会提供与该事件关联的许多属性。 一些属性与用户相关（在Okta User下）。 要访问所有属性，请使用Okta – 读取用户卡。

要查看（和显示/隐藏）所有属性，请单击卡片右下方的齿轮图标，然后选择选择字段。 您可以选择要在卡片上显示的属性。

如何为 if/else 条件创建输出

输出将设置为真或假条件的值。 例如，您可以使用输出来编写动态消息。 以下是创建此类输出的方法：

如何进行部分用户更新

更新用户卡

有两个可用的更新选项Partial和Strict ：

从工作流程文档：

任何未指定的属性都将被忽略，并将保持其当前值。

重要提示：更新用户配置文件时必须指定所有配置文件属性。 请求中未指定的任何属性都设置为 null。

当您选择Partial选项时，一个名为Pass Empty Values 的选项？ 变得可用。 它是这样工作的：

如果Yes ，将更新所有选择并填写有效值的字段。 所有选定但留空的字段将被清除，特殊字段除外。 请参阅下面的注释。 所有未选择的字段将保持不变。

如果No ，将更新所有选择并填写有效值的字段。 所有未选择或留空的字段将保持不变。

重要的是您知道此选项，因为它们可以显着改变更新的工作方式。

两个资源可帮助您了解更多信息：

一旦暂停，oktaworkflows 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，oktaworkflows 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，oktaworkflows 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 oktaworkflows 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 oktaworkflow：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 oktaworkflow 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Welcome to another Okta Workflows Tips post. Read all other tips ⤵️


In this post:
  • Use Read User card to access all user properties
  • How to create output for an if/else condition
  • How to do a partial user update

How to use Read User card to access all user properties

When an Okta connection event fires it makes available many properties associated with the event. Some of the properties are user-related (under Okta User ). An Okta user has many more properties (and custom properties). To access all the properties use Okta – Read User card.

To see (and show/hide) all properties, click the gear icon in the card’s lower right and then select Choose fields. You can select what attributes to show on the card.

How to create output for an if/else condition

The Branching – If/Else allows you to create a card output. The output will be set to value from either the true or the false condition. For example, you can use the output to compose a dynamic message. Here is how to create such output:

How to do a partial user update

The Okta – Update User card has a number of important properties that you need to be aware of when updating a user profile.

There are two update options available Partial and Strict :

From Workflows documentation:

Partial: Updates a user’s profile or credentials with partial update semantics. Any properties that are not specified are ignored, and will maintain their current value.

Strict: Updates a user’s profile and credentials using strict-update semantics. IMPORTANT: All profile properties must be specified when updating a user’s profile. Any property not specified in the request is set to null.

https://help.okta.com/wf/en-us/Content/Topics/Workflows/connector-reference/okta/actions/updateuser.htm

When you choose the Partial option, an option called Pass Empty Values? becomes available. It works like this:

If Yes, all fields selected and filled in with valid values will be updated. All fields selected but left blank will be cleared, except special fields. See the note below. All fields unselected will remain unchanged.

If No, all fields selected and filled in with valid values will be updated. All fields unselected or left blank will remain unchanged.

https://help.okta.com/wf/en-us/Content/Topics/Workflows/connector-reference/okta/actions/updateuser.htm

It’s import you are aware of this options as they can significantly change how the update works.

Two resources to help you learn more:

📌 Try this step-by-step getting started tutorial: Build Your First Automation With Okta Workflows: Notify When User Is Suspended.

📌 All the Workflows resources (docs, tutorial, office hours, templates, office hours and more)

Once suspended, oktaworkflows will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, oktaworkflows will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by oktaworkflows will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If oktaworkflows is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag oktaworkflows:

oktaworkflows consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging oktaworkflows will restore default visibility to their posts.
